section_title: Magistrate may prohibit repetition or continuance of public nuisance
chapter_title: Chapter: 10 – Maintenance Of Public Order And Tranquillity
text: A District Magistrate or Sub-divisional Magistrate, or any other Executive Magistrate empowered by the Stale Government or the District Magistrate in this behalf, may order any person not to repeat or continue a public nuisance, as defined in the Indian Penal Code (45 of 1860), or any special or local law.
